name: Uranium One Inc.
description: Uranium One Inc. is an international group of companies and a wholly-owned subsidiary of Uranium One Holding N.V., which is part of the Russian State Corporation for Nuclear Energy, Rosatom. As one of the world’s largest uranium producers, the company maintains a globally diversified portfolio of assets, including mining, exploration, and development projects located in Kazakhstan, Tanzania, Namibia, and the United States. Uranium One focuses on the extraction of natural uranium, supplying the global energy market with fuel for nuclear power generation while managing a broad range of international mining operations.
